creator: takemoto@shp.sony.co.jp
text:
(I am not good at writing in English. I'm sorry about
 I often write unusual expressions in English.)

ports/japanese/zipcodes uses zipcodes data at Oct.30, 1998.
japanese zipcodes data was updated.

And MASTER_SITES for ports/japanese/zipcodes is changed.

If you can read Japanese language, see http://www.postal.mpt.go.jp/
It is official site for Ministry of Posts and Telecommunications in Japan.

Fix: % cd /usr/ports/japanese
% cp -rp zipcodes zipcodes.bak

(edit) zipcodes/Makefile
(edit) zipcodes/distinfo

% diff -ruN zipcodes.bak zipcodes
